prompt: Create a vertical fine-art surreal fashion portrait of a young East Asian woman shown in elegant side profile, head bowed slightly with closed or downcast eyes, calm and melancholic expression, black hair swept into an updo that dissolves into many thin bare tree branches. She wears a sheer couture gown with an open back, translucent gray tulle sleeves and layered fabric, covered in intricate black vine-like embroidery and delicate floral lace; include blue blossoms concentrated around the lower dress and hip, plus white flowers on the sleeve and shoulder. The figure should appear partly merging with botanical forms: exact visible motif groups are 5 types—black branching twigs, white lace flowers, deep blue flowers, translucent gray fabric petals, and pale dried baby’s-breath-like stems. Behind her, place a large dark circular moon or ink-wash halo in deep navy and black, with a misty glowing white-blue center, surrounded by pale cream background space and sweeping abstract white ink plumes at both upper corners. Use a dramatic high-fashion editorial composition, centered full torso to knees, ultra-detailed textures, porcelain skin, soft directional light from the left, painterly mixed-media feel combining photorealistic portraiture, ink wash, botanical lace, and dark romantic fantasy. Color palette: black, ivory, smoky gray, deep midnight blue, desaturated teal, and soft cream. No text, no watermark, no frame; keep the image tall 2:3 and highly detailed.
